input.command:
echo "=== namespace resources ==="
kubectl get all -n elasticsearch
echo "=== secret es-secure-settings ==="
kubectl get secret es-secure-settings -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.data}' | tr ',' '\n'
echo
echo "=== minio service ==="
kubectl get svc -n elasticsearch | grep -i minio
echo "=== es statefulset ==="
kubectl get statefulset es -n elasticsearch -o yaml

echo "=== all secrets in elasticsearch ns ==="
kubectl get secrets -n elasticsearch
echo "=== minio deployment env / secret refs ==="
kubectl get deployment minio -n elasticsearch -o yaml | grep -A5 -i secret
echo "=== minio-init job ==="
kubectl get job minio-init -n elasticsearch -o yaml | grep -A5 -i secret
echo "=== configmap es-config ==="
kubectl get cm es-config -n elasticsearch -o yaml

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch
  serviceName: es-discovery
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch
    spec:
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-permissions
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command: ["sh", "-c", "chown -R 1000:1000 /usr/share/elasticsearch/data"]
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
        - name: init-keystore
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              mkdir -p /mnt/config-dir
              cp -a /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/. /mnt/config-dir/
              export ES_PATH_CONF=/mnt/config-dir
              /usr/share/elasticsearch/bin/elasticsearch-keystore create
              /usr/share/elasticsearch/bin/elasticsearch-keystore add-file s3.client.default.access_key /secure-settings/access_key
              /usr/share/elasticsearch/bin/elasticsearch-keystore add-file s3.client.default.secret_key /secure-settings/secret_key
              chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/config-dir
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config-dir
              mountPath: /mnt/config-dir
            - name: secure-settings
              mountPath: /secure-settings
              readOnly: true
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              memory: 2Gi
          env:
            - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elastic-password
                  key: password
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 9200
            - name: transport
              containerPort: 9300
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
            - name: config-dir
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config
            - name: config
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              subPath: elasticsearch.yml
            - name: certs
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
              readOnly: true
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - |
                  curl -s -k -u elastic:${ELASTIC_PASSWORD} https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -Eq '"status":"(green|yellow)"'
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9200
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: es-config
        - name: certs
          secret:
            secretName: es-http-tls
        - name: config-dir
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: secure-settings
          secret:
            secretName: es-secure-settings
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

input.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: minio-init
  namespace: elasticsearch
  labels:
    app: minio-init
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: minio-init
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: mc
          image: minio/mc:latest
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              for i in $(seq 1 60); do
                mc alias set local http://minio.elasticsearch.svc.cluster.local:9000 "$MINIO_ROOT_USER" "$MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD" && break
                sleep 2
              done
              mc mb -p local/es-backups || true
          env:
            - name: MINIO_ROOT_USER
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: minio-root
                  key: rootUser
            - name: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: minio-root
                  key: rootPassword
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
